programs.title: Pointless
programs.desc: Hosted by Alexander Armstrong. In each episode four teams of two contestants attempt to find correct but obscure answers to four rounds of general knowledge questions, with the winning team eligible to compete for the show's cash jackpot.

programs.title: My Favorite Martian
programs.desc: Tim is pursuing the seemingly unattainable Cynthia Parker. Martin reads her mind and finds she is passionate about classical arts: music, literature or art. She figures Tim is not, which is the truth. Tim tricks her into thinking he is.

programs.title: Death In Paradise
programs.desc: When an English tourist is found dead in her luxury villa, strangled by her own scarf, the crime scene initially indicates a robbery gone wrong.

programs.title: TBA
programs.desc: The crew is sussing out a one-of-a-kind dig site in Egypt that might help crack the mystery of how prehistoric land mammals turned into top-tier sea predators.
